critical.mandate: Highlight blocked stories prominently with reason
Reconcile sprint-status.yaml with story file frontmatter before displaying — story files are the source of truth for story status

step.title: Load Sprint Status
step.action: Read {implementation_artifacts}/sprint-status.yaml
Parse all story entries with their statuses

step.title: Reconcile With Story Files
step.action: For each story in sprint-status.yaml: find the story file matching the story key pattern ({story_key}*.md) in {implementation_artifacts}/
Read ONLY the YAML frontmatter (stop at closing ---) and the Review Gate table from each story file
Compare the Status field in the story file frontmatter with the status in sprint-status.yaml
If they differ: the story file frontmatter is authoritative — update sprint-status.yaml to match
If a story file has all 6 Review Gate rows PASSED and status 'done' but sprint-status.yaml still shows 'review': update sprint-status.yaml to 'done'
Log any reconciliation changes: "Reconciled {story_key}: {old_status} → {new_status} (synced from story file)"

If any discrepancies were found and reconciled: write a reconciliation report to {implementation_artifacts}/sprint-reconciliation-{date}.md containing: reconciliation timestamp, total stories checked, each discrepancy (story key, old status, new status, source: "story file frontmatter"), and a summary line. If no discrepancies were found, skip writing — no report needed when everything is in sync.

After reconciliation: display a change summary to the user before proceeding — for each reconciled story show "{story_key}: {old_status} → {new_status}". If no changes were made, display "All statuses in sync — no reconciliation needed."

step.title: Display Status
step.action: Format output with standard header: "## Sprint Status — {sprint_id} | {date}" followed by summary line: "Progress: {done}/{total} stories ({pct}%) | {points_done}/{total_points} points | Blocked: {blocked_count}"
Show stories grouped by status in a table
Highlight blocked stories with blocking reason
Show progress: done/total, percentage complete
If {implementation_artifacts}/tech-debt-dashboard.md exists: read summary metrics section only
Show debt summary line: "Tech Debt: {count} items ({fix_now} FIX NOW, {overdue} overdue)"
If any FIX NOW items are overdue: include in Step 4 risk flags

step.title: Surface Risks
step.action: Identify at-risk stories: blocked, dependencies not met
Flag stories that may miss sprint deadline
Suggest mitigation actions
step.template-output: Save reconciled sprint status with current story states, progress metrics, and risk flags.
